name: Cindy Yang
heroText: Hey! I'm an engineering student at the University of Michigan who has risked her life dabbling in CSS to bring you this website. Thank you for your time today - I hope you enjoy your stay.
aboutText: Based in the DM(V) and studying in Ann Arbor, I'm an experienced software engineer with extensive knowledge in full-stack development, embedded systems, and robotics. In my free time I enjoy being an amateur musician, wannabe fashionista, and sci-fi nerd. I also love flashing a softly graded climb.
